# Pinned dependencies for supply_chain_research
#
# Reproducibility manifest (FIX-001 / clause C2.22).
# Every package below is pinned to the exact version installed on the
# audit machine the day this file was generated. New checkouts MUST
# install via this file from a clean venv to reproduce all reported
# results bit-for-bit.
#
# Audit machine (source of truth for `pip freeze`):
#   python --version  ->  Python 3.14.3
#   pip --version     ->  pip 26.0
#
# Every line is either blank, a comment, or matches the regex `.*==.*`.
# Verified by:
#   grep -vE "^(#|$|.*==)" supply_chain_research/requirements.txt | wc -l   # MUST be 0
#
# Packages are grouped by role; within a group, versions match `pip show`
# output on the audit machine. Two packages (`pylatex` and `SALib`) are
# imported by production modules but were not present on the audit
# machine at freeze time; they are pinned to a current PyPI release
# that resolves cleanly against the rest of the manifest. Any future
# change to those two pins MUST be paired with a regression run.
#
# `mlflow` is no longer used by any module in this repo (the previous
# `cloud_training/modal_train_unified.py` Hydra wrapper that imported
# it was removed during the cleanup pass). It is intentionally not
# listed here.

# --- Core scientific computing ---
numpy==2.4.2
pandas==3.0.1
scipy==1.17.1
statsmodels==0.14.6
joblib==1.5.3

# --- Networking / HTTP ---
requests==2.32.5

# --- Progress / Logging ---
tqdm==4.67.3
loguru==0.7.3
rich==14.3.3

# --- Multi-objective optimization ---
pymoo==0.6.1.6
ortools==9.15.6755

# --- Discrete-event simulation ---
simpy==4.1.1

# --- Deep learning ---
torch==2.10.0
gymnasium==1.3.0
tensorboard==2.20.0

# --- Visualization ---
matplotlib==3.10.8
seaborn==0.13.2

# --- Configuration / Validation ---
pydantic==2.12.5

# --- Document generation (used by phase1 formulation_latex + phase4 latex tables) ---
pylatex==1.4.2
jinja2==3.1.6

# --- Web API (webapp/backend FastAPI service + endpoint tests) ---
fastapi==0.135.1

# --- Testing ---
pytest==9.0.2
pytest-cov==7.1.0
pytest-timeout==2.4.0
hypothesis==6.151.9

# --- Machine learning (used by phase2 shock_models DBSCAN) ---
scikit-learn==1.8.0

# --- Sobol global sensitivity (phase4 sensitivity_analysis) ---
SALib==1.5.1
